operational_knowledge_units.title: Go-to function can send an idle AGV to a selected square for recovery positioning
operational_knowledge_units.summary: The slide states that an AGV not currently in a task can be sent to any square using the Go-to function. This is presented as a quick recovery aid, including an example where a tipper is down and an AGV will not leave; the AGV can be removed and added, then sent to the hospital using Go-to. The AGV will pick up a new task once its tote has been removed.
observed_evidence: “An AGV not in a task can be sent to any square.”
“This is helpful when trying to recover quickly.”
“Example if a Tipper goes down and an AGV will not leave.”
“You can remove and add the agv and use the go to function to drop it off at the hospital.”
“The AGV will pickup a new task once it’s tote has been removed”

relationships.target: tipper down and AGV will not leave
AGV picks up a new task after tote removal

operational_knowledge_units.retrieval_text: Go-to function behavior: an AGV not in a task can be sent to any square. This is used for quick recovery. Example given: if a tipper goes down and an AGV will not leave, remove and add the AGV and use Go-to to drop it off at the hospital. The AGV will pick up a new task once its tote has been removed.

operational_knowledge_units.title: Go-to workflow requires AGV selection, destination square selection, and confirmation
operational_knowledge_units.summary: The slide presents a UI-driven Go-to workflow with explicit actions: select an AGV, select Go to, choose the square, and confirm.
observed_evidence: “3. Select which square you want the AGV to go to”
operational_knowledge_units.retrieval_text: Go-to UI concept: user selects an AGV, selects Go to, selects the destination square, then selects Confirm.

procedure_candidate_attempts.title: Send an AGV to a selected square using Go-to
preconditions: AGV is not in a task
procedure_candidate_attempts.procedure_visual_summary: Slide titled 'Robot Selection / Go-to function' with numbered UI steps for selecting an AGV, using Go to, choosing a square, and confirming.

steps.expected_result: An AGV is chosen for the Go-to action.
steps.visual_region_hint: Numbered step 1 area on the slide

steps.expected_result: The Go-to function is opened for the selected AGV.
steps.visual_region_hint: Numbered step 2 area on the slide

steps.action: Select which square you want the AGV to go to.
steps.expected_result: A destination square is selected for the AGV.
steps.visual_region_hint: Numbered step 3 area on the slide

steps.expected_result: The Go-to command is confirmed for the selected square.
steps.visual_region_hint: Numbered step 4 area on the slide

warnings: The slide states the AGV must not be in a task.

Recovery example context mentions a tipper-down condition and sending the AGV to the hospital after removing and adding the AGV, but those remove/add actions are described as context rather than explicit numbered steps in this procedure.
procedure_candidate_attempts.retrieval_text: Procedure to send an idle AGV to a square using Go-to: select an AGV, select Go to, select the destination square, and select Confirm. Preconditions: AGV is not in a task.
